title: CFI.co Articles Transparency Archive - canonical record
description: Schema for the canonical machine record (articles/<year>/<id>-<slug>.json). The .md file is a human-readable view of the same data; the JSON is authoritative. Schema version 2.2 (2026-07-08: added classification.license). Producer: scripts/export.php (committed in this repository).

x-integrity.content_sha256: SHA-256 (hex) of the verbatim content_html string.
x-integrity.record_sha256: SHA-256 (hex) of the record serialised WITHOUT the record_sha256 field, using PHP json_encode with JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE. Recompute with scripts/verify.sh.
x-integrity.manifest: MANIFEST.sha256 at the repository root lists the SHA-256 of every tracked file.

id.description: Stable numeric record ID (publishing-system post ID). Canonical record ID form: cfi-article-<id>.

url.description: Canonical CFI.co URL for this article.

author.description: Fixed editorial label; internal staff usernames are deliberately not exposed.

modified_gmt.description: UTC last-modified timestamp from the publishing system.

categories.description: Substantive section/sector/region categories only; rotating homepage-curation categories are deliberately excluded for stability.

classification.description: Machine-readable labels. Lives INSIDE the hashed record, so labels are as tamper-evident as the content. Preserve intact when redistributing (licence s.4).

editorial_lens.description: CFI.co's stated editorial stance (declared policy, not a per-article measurement).

sponsor_name.description: Disclosed sponsor; empty when not sponsored.

historical_status.description: Accurate to its time; judge recency against published.

correction_status.description: Git history is the authoritative correction record; flips to revised when a later content change is committed.

wayback_status.description: Independent Internet Archive corroboration; archived is claimed only when a real snapshot exists.

wayback_first_snapshot.description: Earliest Wayback capture, YYYYMMDDhhmmss. Present only when wayback_status = archived.

license.description: CFI.co Open AI Access Licence v1.0. Canonical text: https://cfi.co/licence/oaal-1.0 and LICENCE.md in this repository.

content_html.description: RAW, verbatim article body exactly as held in the publishing system - no reformatting, no filters, no HTML-to-Markdown conversion.
